rationale: The exact user-provided RAG source URLs were opened directly, supplemental official component docs were checked, and 10 subagents cross-reviewed the findings. The accepted memory stores only bounded paraphrased claims, keeps provider/paper-specific facts source-bound, and rejects overgeneralizations.
follow_up: Create retrieval canaries for synonym recall, Korean-English mixed queries, provenance-required answers, and memory-on vs memory-off behavior.
Replace lexical dense-lite fallback with a real embedding provider before claiming live dense hybrid retrieval.
Keep provider-specific feature claims source-bound and refresh before implementation decisions.
